title: ReceiptLinks
description: Links between stored receipts and canonical spine transactions (FR-DOC-001). Provided by Module 12 to Tasks, Inbox, Workspace, and Travel (trip receipts). A link is an ASSERTION, not a money mutation: Module 12 never edits TransactionStream — it only references transaction_id. Ambiguous matches (>1 equal-amount/merchant/day candidate) are NOT auto-linked; they are surfaced for user confirmation and the chosen resolution is recorded and auditable (umbrella AS-4). Amounts are integer minor units; no binary float. Each link carries a FreshnessStamp reflecting the matching run.

profile_id.description: Owning profile; authZ from validated session, never client-supplied (FR-X-010).

link_id.description: Stable link id; idempotency key for the matching write (UNIQUE on profile_id+document_id+transaction_id).

transaction_id.description: Resolved TransactionStream transaction id (finos:spine/TransactionStream). null while match_state is 'unmatched' or 'ambiguous_pending'.

match_state.description: matched = confident single match; ambiguous_pending = multiple candidates, awaiting user confirmation (NEVER silently auto-linked, AS-4); unmatched = no candidate; user_confirmed/user_rejected = explicit user resolution (recorded + audited).

match_method.description: How the candidate(s) were found, for explainability (FR-X-006).

candidate_transaction_ids.description: For match_state='ambiguous_pending': the equal-amount/merchant/day candidates surfaced for user disambiguation. Empty otherwise.

match_confidence.description: Heuristic confidence for the chosen/leading candidate. Informational; ambiguity is resolved by the user, not by a confidence threshold alone.

receipt_amount.description: Receipt total in integer cents used for matching. Compared exactly (integer equality) against the transaction's cad_amount — never via float tolerance.

reasoning.description: Why this link/ambiguity (FR-X-006). Bilingual rationale (Constitution II).

resolved_by.description: 'user' when the user confirmed/rejected an ambiguous match; the resolution is recorded in the append-only audit trail (FR-X-007).

freshness.description: Freshness of the matching run (source='derived'); reflects the TransactionStream freshness it matched against. A stale transaction feed flags the link rather than asserting a confident match on old data (FR-X-008).
